{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20178_1
|class_id=20178
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=collection@20178_2
|fame=15
|art=30
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=prop@69730_2<br>prop@69731_2<br>prop@69731_3
|ss2=prop@69730_2<br>prop@69731_2<br>prop@69731_3
|ss3=prop@69730_2<br>prop@69731_2<br>prop@69731_3
|ss4=prop@69730_2<br>prop@69731_2<br>prop@69731_3
|ss7=prop@69730_2<br>prop@69731_2<br>prop@69731_3<br> (Awakened)
}}
